member.name: T:HybridRoots.HybridRootsResult
member.summary: Holds the result of a HybridRoots algorithm call. Mirrors scipy.optimize.RootResults for cross-language consistency.

member.name: P:HybridRoots.HybridRootsResult.Iterations
member.summary: Gets the number of iterations performed.

member.name: P:HybridRoots.HybridRootsResult.FunctionCalls
member.summary: Gets the number of function evaluations performed.

member.name: P:HybridRoots.HybridRootsResult.Converged
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether |f(root)| <= tol.

member.name: T:HybridRoots.Core
member.summary:
Four Multi-Phase Hybrid Bracketing Algorithms for Numerical Root Finding.
All algorithms are deterministic and guarantee convergence for any continuous function f on a bracket [a, b] where f(a)*f(b) < 0.
Reference: Ellithy, A. (2026). Journal of the Egyptian Mathematical Society, 34. DOI:

member.name: M:HybridRoots.Core.Mpbf(System.Func{System.Double,System.Double},System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Multi-Phase Bisection–False Position (Opt.BF).
Combines classical Bisection with False Position for guaranteed convergence with faster interval reduction. See Section 2 of the paper.
member.param: The continuous function whose root is sought.
Left endpoint of the initial bracket (f(a)*f(b) < 0).
Right endpoint of the initial bracket.
Absolute tolerance; convergence declared when |f(x)| <= tol.
Maximum number of iterations allowed.
member.returns: A with root, iterations, functionCalls, and converged.

member.name: M:HybridRoots.Core.Mpbfms(System.Func{System.Double,System.Double},System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Multi-Phase Bisection–False Position–Modified Secant (Opt.BFMS).
Extends Opt.BF with an adaptive Modified Secant acceleration step that is accepted only when it reduces the residual and remains in-bracket. See Section 3 of the paper.
member.param: The continuous function whose root is sought.
Left endpoint of the initial bracket.
Right endpoint of the initial bracket.
Absolute tolerance.
Maximum number of iterations.

member.name: M:HybridRoots.Core.Mptf(System.Func{System.Double,System.Double},System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Multi-Phase Trisection–False Position (Opt.TF).
Divides the bracket into thirds for faster interval reduction, then applies False Position refinement. See Section 4 of the paper.
member.param: The continuous function whose root is sought.
Left endpoint of the initial bracket.
Right endpoint of the initial bracket.
Absolute tolerance.
Maximum number of iterations.

member.name: M:HybridRoots.Core.Mptfms(System.Func{System.Double,System.Double},System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Multi-Phase Trisection–False Position–Modified Secant (Opt.TFMS).
Combines Trisection, False Position, and an adaptive Modified Secant step for maximum efficiency. The fastest of the four algorithms for smooth functions. See Section 5 of the paper.
member.param: The continuous function whose root is sought.
Left endpoint of the initial bracket.
Right endpoint of the initial bracket.
Absolute tolerance.
Maximum number of iterations.
